required_skills: Artifact Management and Binary Repository Governance
Semantic Versioning and Release Branching Strategy
Build System Design and Dependency Management
Rollback Mechanism Design and Hotfix Workflow Management
preferred_skills: Progressive Delivery with Feature Flags and Canary Releases
Release Train Coordination for Large-Scale Platforms
Compliance and Audit Trail Management for Regulated Industries
Infrastructure Release and Terraform State Promotion
Inner Source and Monorepo Release Strategy
responsibilities: Design and maintain end-to-end release pipelines using Jenkins or GitHub Actions that automate build, test, artifact publication, and environment promotion with full audit traceability
Govern artifact lifecycle management in JFrog Artifactory or Nexus by enforcing immutable artifact policies, retention rules, and cryptographic signing for production releases
Define and enforce branching strategies, merge freeze windows, and release train schedules across multiple engineering teams to coordinate safe, predictable software releases
Implement deployment gating mechanisms including automated smoke tests, canary traffic splitting, and manual approval workflows that prevent broken builds from reaching production
Orchestrate multi-environment release promotions from development through staging to production with environment-specific configuration injection and compliance checkpoint validation
Design and test rollback procedures for every release including database migration reversal, artifact re-deployment, and feature flag kill-switch activation to minimize MTTR
Coordinate cross-team release readiness reviews by aggregating test coverage reports, security scan results, and performance benchmark outcomes into go/no-go release decisions
Implement progressive delivery strategies using Argo Rollouts and LaunchDarkly feature flags to gradually expose new functionality to user segments with automated rollback triggers
Maintain comprehensive release documentation including changelogs, release notes, deployment runbooks, and post-release validation checklists for each production deployment
Establish release metrics including deployment frequency, change failure rate, and mean time to recovery aligned with DORA metrics to continuously improve delivery pipeline maturity
